name: Snappy Tom Tuna Jelly 85g
shortDescription: The amount fed should be adjusted accordingly to your cat activity level. Feed your cat by divided all daily meals into 2 or more servings and ensure fresh clean water is available at all times.
description: The amount fed can be adjusted accordingly to your cat activity level. Feed your cat by divided all daily meals into 2 or more servings and ensure fresh clean water is available at all times. Feeding Guide Cat’s Weight Feeding Amount (g/day) 0.5kg – 1.0kg 100g – 170g 1.0kg – 3.0kg 170g – 400g 3.0kg – 4.0kg 400g – 490g > 4.0kg >490g Ingredient List Tuna Gelling Agents Vitamins & Minerals Taurine Permitted Food Colours Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (Min) 8% Crude Fat (Min) 1.5% Crude Fibre (Max) 1% Moisture (Max) 87%
